meta.title: 6billionforpeace — Time to unite 6 billion voices for peace
meta.description: A voluntary, independent global movement for world peace. Sign and add your voice to 6 billion others. No politics. No religion. No commerce. Only peace.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.p1: Throughout human history, we have lived in war.
solution.p2: Perhaps this made sense in the past. Today, it no longer does.
solution.p3: We are tired of the pain, suffering, and destruction caused by war.
solution.p4: The idea that violence is necessary to achieve peace no longer convinces us.
solution.p5: We cannot continue waiting for politics, governments, religions, corporations, or institutions.
solution.p6: It is time to unite 6 billion voices with a single goal: peace in the world.

call.p1: This will be the greatest peace movement the world has ever known.
call.p2: Peace will no longer be a speech, a promise, or a distant hope.
call.p3: Peace is the survival of humanity.

principles.title: The Principles
principles.sovereignty: No interference in the internal laws or sovereignty of any nation.
principles.maturity: Humanity has reached sufficient maturity to resolve conflict without destroying itself. We know the horror of war. Now, we choose differently.

volunteers.title: Peace Volunteers
volunteers.body: Join our community of dedicated volunteers making a real difference in the lives of people around the world.

everest.body: On the summit of Mount Everest, a white flag bearing the heart of peace will be raised — a sign that humanity has chosen to survive.

form.title: Sign for peace
form.subtitle: Add your voice. Free, anonymous to the public, secure.
form.name: Full name
form.consent: I agree with the collection of my data under the terms of the LGPD/GDPR privacy policy.
form.successBody: Your signature has been added. Share the movement.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.errorDuplicate: This e-mail has already signed. Thank you.
form.errorCaptcha: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.

footer.mission: This is a voluntary and independent project, with no political, religious, or commercial ties. Its sole purpose is peace.

cookie.title: We respect your privacy
cookie.body: We use only the essential data needed to register your signature, in compliance with LGPD/GDPR. We do not use marketing trackers.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
